emails.body: Tana/Kelly/Karen: The product long descriptions below will fall under the new product type: CAN Newsprint Phy Credit (Tom Moran) has approved copying the profiles for the new product type from the following: US Newsprint Phy Please respond no later than 10 a.m. on Wednesday, May 30. Thank you.
